title: How to store and build weather data logging using ESP32?

yaml.title: How to store and build weather data logging using ESP32?
yaml.subtitle: A Practical Tutorial for ESP32-C with SH1106 OLED, BME680, OpenLog SD Logger, and 3 LEDs
yaml.description: In this tutorial, I give you a dataset of temperature readings collected over a day using an ESP32-C-based weather station.
yaml.author: Rick Rejeleene
